description_long: This is a large, multi-structure residential house complex surrounded by a black perimeter fence and featuring a circular driveway at the front. The main building has a dark, gabled roof with several dormers and is flanked by additional wings and outbuildings, including garages and smaller structures. The property includes landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, as well as paved driveways and walkways leading to the main entrance and side buildings. The house is constructed primarily from light-colored materials, with contrasting dark roofing and trim. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed across the facades, and the main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch. The overall layout suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood setting.
description: A large, multi-wing residential house complex with a dark gabled roof, circular driveway, and landscaped grounds, enclosed by a black fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, main entrance with covered porch, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the main building, attached garages, and the continuation of the perimeter fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional outbuildings, and more trees along the back fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garages, side entrances, and the connection to the main road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and dormer windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, decorative columns, and a prominent front door.
